positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant sunset sky. The mountains should feature clean, geometric lines and sharp peaks. Include scattered, stylized stars and crescent moons floating above the peaks. Color palette should be highly saturated, featuring deep purples, burnt oranges, warm yellows, and midnight blues. Composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing. High contrast, clean vector art style, designed for fabric transfer, perfect symmetry, flat graphic design, smooth gradients, rule of thirds incorporated into the overall arrangement. Print-ready, clean edges, no excessive detail in the sky, clean silhouette.
negative: photo, realistic, gradient blur, noise, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, blurry, cropped, low detail, messy lines, logos, trademarks
